nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Escherichia Coli Extract/sr-(Tetrapeptide-74 Hexapeptide-40 Oligopeptide-238 Fruit Fly Polypeptide-1 Heptapeptide-63 Clostridium Cellulovorans Polypeptide-1
chemicalDescription: Escherichia Coli Extract/sr-(Tetrapeptide-74 Hexapeptide-40 Oligopeptide-238 Fruit Fly Polypeptide-1 Heptapeptide-63 Clostridium Cellulovorans Polypeptide-1 is a single chain recombinant peptide produced by fermentation in E. coli, where the final product contains proteins from the E. coli host. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Tetrapeptide-74, Hexapeptide-40, Oligopeptide-238, sr-Fruit Fly Polypeptide-1, Heptapeptide-63 and sr-Clostridium Cellulovorans Polypeptide-1. The fusion peptide contains 519 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: ESCHERICHIA COLI EXTRACT/SR-(TETRAPEPTIDE-74 HEXAPEPTIDE-40 OLIGOPEPTIDE-238 FRUIT FLY POLYPEPTIDE-1 HEPTAPEPTIDE-63 CLOSTRIDIUM CELLULOVORANS POLYPEPTIDE-1
